metadata.title: Soulwayo — Healing, Embodiment & Remembrance
metadata.description: Soulwayo is a space for healing, embodiment and remembrance — trauma therapy, somatic healing, ceremony and retreats with Sarah & Johannes.

hero.tagline: A space for healing, embodiment & remembrance.
hero.sub: Healing happens when the body feels safe enough to return to presence.

space.eyebrow: For when the mind cannot carry it further
space.headline: There comes a moment where overwhelm, disconnection and old patterns become too heavy to hold alone.
space.bodyPre: Soulwayo is the space that meets you there — where the nervous system can soften, emotions can move, and life can begin to flow again. We do not work
space.bodyPost: you — in presence, safety and truth.
space.quote: Healing is not about becoming someone new — but about remembering who you are beneath survival, protection and emotional overwhelm.

pillars.intro: We do not see trauma as a defect. We see it as an intelligent adaptation — a protective response that can gently unwind when safety returns.

p1.title: Trauma Therapy & Somatic Healing
p1.body: Emotional processing, nervous system regulation and trauma integration — through psychotherapy and body-based work. A slow return to inner stability and self-trust.

p2.title: Ceremony, Fire & Cacao
p2.body: Meditation, Grandfather Fire and sacred cacao. Space beyond the thinking mind — for heart opening, emotional release and reconnection to intuition and truth.

p3.title: Retreats
p3.body: Immersive healing journeys in nature — silence, ceremony and guided inner work. Here, healing is not rushed; it unfolds in its own intelligent rhythm.

about.name: Sarah & Johannes
about.body: Partners in life and in work, united by a shared path of healing, presence and transformation. Our work was born from lived experience and many years of accompanying people through emotional healing, trauma integration and embodied transformation.
about.quote: We do not see healing as a technique. We see it as a relational field — something that happens in safety, presence and truth.

retreats.headline: A space to return to yourself.
retreats.quote: A call to slow down. To feel again. To breathe again. To return.
retreats.body: Held by nature, presence and deep emotional safety. You are not asked to perform, fix or achieve. You are invited to arrive — exactly as you are.

flyer.title: Awaken Your True Path
flyer.body: A journey of initiation, alignment and inner leadership. Shed old skins. Choose your soul path anew. Walk beside us in presence and reverence.

final.headline: If your heart feels a quiet yes, we would be honoured to walk this journey with you.
final.body: Soulwayo is not a place to become someone else. It is a space to return — gently, honestly, and in your own timing.

footer.legal: A complementary, trauma-informed approach — not a substitute for medical or psychiatric care. © 2026 Soulwayo. All rights reserved.
